name: growmax-skills
description: Growmax team Claude Code skills and workflows. Auto-discovers skills/, commands/, agents/, and hooks/. Ships: github-repo-analyzer (skill); learn-app + product-manager (per-repo product notebook — /learn-app builds and maintains docs/product/ from a code census + optional read-only walk, with an async question ledger the human answers in-file; the product-manager agent answers questions and writes specs from the notebook with per-claim provenance, never inventing product truth); feature-review (end-of-development multi-agent review — TDD compliance, contextual-creation UX, 10k-row scalability + security sweep, advisory architecture ideas — one verified scorecard with a per-finding HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence report, a run ledger, and a periodic-calibration process for improving precision over time); security-audit (whole-app OWASP Top 10 audit → one human gate → approved-only fix batch — fans out the same scale-security-reviewer per module shard plus a Trivy dependency/secret/misconfig shard, adversarially refutes every finding, writes an approvable ledger with an OWASP coverage table, then fixes each ticked finding exploit-test-first via the security-fixer agent and re-verifies; shares one security rulebook with feature-review, two scopes); app-cartograph (map a live app into durable context — navigation + business flows + knowledge graph — via a code-seeded frontier and a write-safe human-in-the-loop walk; runs upstream of E2E); e2e-flow (gated multi-agent E2E test-generation for a single flow, web + api); and e2e-map + e2e-batch (whole-app flow census → one approval → autonomous suite generation).
